message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="QA review for T1 JWT security">
You are QA reviewer for task T1: M1 - User Entity + JWT Security Foundation.

INPUT (Read these files):
- Task description: Build authentication infrastructure — User entity (id, username unique 3-50 alphanumeric+underscore, password bcrypt, displayName 1-100, createdAt), UserRepository (findByUsername), JwtTokenProvider (generateToken/validateToken/getUserIdFromToken with JJWT 0.12.5), JwtAuthenticationFilter (OncePerRequestFilter, Bearer token extraction, SecurityContext), SecurityConfig (JWT filter registration, AuthenticationEntryPoint for 401).
  AC: M1-AC3 (bcrypt stored), M1-AC8 (no header→401), M1-AC9 (expired→401), M1-AC10 (malformed→401)
- Test files:
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/UserTest.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepositoryTest.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProviderTest.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilterTest.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/SecurityIntegrationTest.java
- Implementation files:
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- Standards summary: none
- Standards files: none
- ALLOWED files: entity/User.java, repository/UserRepository.java, security/JwtTokenProvider.java, security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java, config/SecurityConfig.java
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/logs/qa-task-1.log.md

Also run the tests to verify they actually pass:
cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend && ./mvnw test -Dtest="UserTest,UserRepositoryTest,JwtTokenProviderTest,JwtAuthenticationFilterTest,SecurityIntegrationTest" -pl . 2>&1 | tail -30

YOUR JOB: Three-way cross-verification + standards compliance. Trust NO single artifact.

STEP 1: Requirements ↔ Tests
STEP 2: Tests ↔ Code
STEP 3: Requirements ↔ Code
STEP 4: Standards Compliance — SKIPPED (no standards)
STEP 5: Code Quality
STEP 6: File Scope — only ALLOWED files modified

WRITE LOG then RETURN: QA-PASS or QA-FAIL with details.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I'll start by reading all the relevant files in parallel.
Now let me read all the implementation files, test files, and the CONTRACT in parallel.

content.content:
1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
    17→[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body
    22→
    23→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    24→[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
    25→[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
    26→[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
    27→[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    30→

file.content:
[SECTION] API Contract
[VERSION] 1

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body

[SECTION] State Machine Rules
[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)

[SECTION] Amendment Log

content.text: Good. Now I have all the information needed for the QA review. Let me also check the pom.xml to verify JJWT 0.12.5 dependency.

input.description: Check JJWT dependency version in pom.xml

content.content:
<jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
--
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

input.content:
# QA Log — T1: M1 - User Entity + JWT Security Foundation

## Test Execution
- Command: `mvn test -Dtest="UserTest,UserRepositoryTest,JwtTokenProviderTest,JwtAuthenticationFilterTest,SecurityIntegrationTest"`
- Result: **43 tests run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped — BUILD SUCCESS**

## STEP 1: Requirements <-> Tests

| Requirement | Test Coverage | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| User entity (id, username, password, displayName, createdAt) | UserTest: field get/set, null id before persist, null createdAt before persist | PASS |
| Username: unique, 3-50, alphanumeric+underscore | UserTest: reject <3, accept 3, accept 50, reject >50, accept alphanum+underscore, reject special chars; UserRepositoryTest: enforce unique | PASS |
| DisplayName: 1-100 | UserTest: reject empty, accept 100, reject >100 | PASS |
| Password: bcrypt stored (M1-AC3) | UserRepositoryTest: shouldStoreBcryptHashNotPlaintext; SecurityIntegrationTest: shouldEncodeToBcryptHash | PASS |
| UserRepository.findByUsername | UserRepositoryTest: found + not found | PASS |
| JwtTokenProvider: generateToken | JwtTokenProviderTest: non-null, valid, different for different users | PASS |
| JwtTokenProvider: validateToken | JwtTokenProviderTest: valid, malformed (AC10), null, empty, wrong signature, expired (AC9) | PASS |
| JwtTokenProvider: getUserIdFromToken | JwtTokenProviderTest: single + multiple user IDs | PASS |
| JwtAuthenticationFilter: Bearer extraction | JwtAuthenticationFilterTest: no header (AC8), non-Bearer, valid Bearer, invalid token, exception handling, filter chain always continues | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: JWT filter registered | SecurityIntegrationTest: valid token allows access, invalid/missing denies | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: AuthenticationEntryPoint 401 | SecurityIntegrationTest: no header->401 (AC8), expired->401 (AC9), malformed->401 (AC10) | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: /api/auth/** permitAll | SecurityIntegrationTest: shouldAllowAccessToAuthEndpointsWithoutToken | PASS |
| BCryptPasswordEncoder bean | SecurityIntegrationTest: shouldHaveBCryptPasswordEncoderBean | PASS |
| JJWT 0.12.5 | pom.xml: jjwt.version=0.12.5 with api/impl/jackson | PASS |

**Step 1 Verdict: PASS** — All requirements have corresponding test coverage.

## STEP 2: Tests <-> Code

| Test Class | Implementation Class | Verified Behavior Matches | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|
| UserTest (11 tests) | User.java | Entity annotations (@Entity, @Table, @Id, @GeneratedValue, @Size, @Pattern, @NotBlank, @Column unique, @PrePersist) all match test expectations | PASS |
| UserRepositoryTest (6 tests) | UserRepository.java | Interface extends JpaRepository, findByUsername returns Optional<User>, unique constraint enforced by @Column(unique=true) | PASS |
| JwtTokenProviderTest (9 tests) | JwtTokenProvider.java | generateToken uses JJWT builder with subject=userId, validateToken catches all exceptions, getUserIdFromToken parses subject | PASS |
| JwtAuthenticationFilterTest (7 tests) | JwtAuthenticationFilter.java | Extends OncePerRequestFilter, extracts Bearer token, sets SecurityContext on valid token, catches exceptions, always continues filter chain | PASS |
| SecurityIntegrationTest (8 tests) | SecurityConfig.java | CSRF disabled, stateless sessions, custom AuthenticationEntryPoint returning 401+JSON, /api/auth/** and /h2-console/** permitAll, JWT filter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter, BCryptPasswordEncoder bean | PASS |

**Step 2 Verdict: PASS** — All tests correctly verify the implementation behavior.

## STEP 3: Requirements <-> Code

| Requirement | Code Location | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| User entity fields: id (Long, auto), username (String unique 3-50 alphanum+_), password (String), displayName (String 1-100 NotBlank), createdAt (LocalDateTime @PrePersist) | User.java:18-82 | PASS |
| UserRepository.findByUsername | UserRepository.java:10 | PASS |
| JwtTokenProvider.generateToken(Long userId) → String | JwtTokenProvider.java:29-41 | PASS |
| JwtTokenProvider.validateToken(String token) → boolean | JwtTokenProvider.java:43-54 | PASS |
| JwtTokenProvider.getUserIdFromToken(String token) → Long | JwtTokenProvider.java:56-65 | PASS |
| JJWT 0.12.5 API usage (Jwts.builder/parser, verifyWith, parseSignedClaims) | JwtTokenProvider.java — correct 0.12.x API | PASS |
| JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter | JwtAuthenticationFilter.java:16 | PASS |
| Bearer token extraction from Authorization header | JwtAuthenticationFilter.java:43-49 | PASS |
| Sets UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken in SecurityContext | JwtAuthenticationFilter.java:32-34 | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: JWT filter registration before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | SecurityConfig.java:47 | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: AuthenticationEntryPoint returns 401 + JSON | SecurityConfig.java:33-37 | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: /api/auth/** permitAll | SecurityConfig.java:40 | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: BCryptPasswordEncoder bean | SecurityConfig.java:53-55 | PASS |
| SecurityConfig: stateless session, CSRF disabled | SecurityConfig.java:28-31 | PASS |

**Step 3 Verdict: PASS** — Code fully implements all requirements.

## STEP 4: Standards Compliance
SKIPPED — No standards files provided.

## STEP 5: Code Quality

| Aspect | Assessment | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| No hardcoded secrets | Default secret via @Value with property placeholder; acceptable for dev | PASS |
| Exception handling | JwtTokenProvider.validateToken catches all exceptions; JwtAuthenticationFilter catches and silently continues — correct for filter | PASS |
| Thread safety | SecurityContextHolder usage is correct | PASS |
| No SQL injection risk | Using Spring Data JPA query methods | PASS |
| No XSS risk | JSON responses only | PASS |
| Proper password handling | BCryptPasswordEncoder provided as bean; password stored as hash | PASS |
| Session management | Stateless — correct for JWT | PASS |
| Token expiration | Configurable via @Value; expired token properly rejected | PASS |

**Step 5 Verdict: PASS**

## STEP 6: File Scope

ALLOWED files: entity/User.java, repository/UserRepository.java, security/JwtTokenProvider.java, security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java, config/SecurityConfig.java

Modified/created main source files (from git status):
- backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java — NEW, ALLOWED
- backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java — NEW, ALLOWED
- backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java — NEW, ALLOWED
- backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java — NEW, ALLOWED
- backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java — MODIFIED, ALLOWED

**Step 6 Verdict: PASS** — No out-of-scope files modified.

## Final Verdict: QA-PASS

All 43 tests pass. Three-way cross-verification (Requirements <-> Tests <-> Code) confirms full alignment. No out-of-scope files modified. No code quality issues found.
